hero_subtitle: SFTY helps institutional VASPs track and maintain versioned compliance evidence with controlled access and audit logs to support governance, bank due diligence, and regulatory review.

problem_title: Evidence management becomes difficult to govern
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain a clear and auditable record when evidence updates and versions are scattered across multiple systems. This fragmentation weakens internal control over audit trails, complicating regulatory reviews and institutional due diligence for digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY maintains a unified evidence repository that tracks all updates and versions with role-based access and audit logs to support clear, controlled, and auditable compliance workflows for institutional teams.
workflow_title: From case evidence to audit report
workflow_description: SFTY tracks evidence versions through review, updates and approvals to create a clear audit trail supporting institutional compliance and reporting needs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for regulated VASPs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs a connected compliance layer that connects provider outputs, workflows, case management and audit evidence across onboarding, KYT, Travel Rule and reporting operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage compliance evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY tracks evidence versions by preserving decision logs, linked provider data and case history, enabling compliance teams to review changes and updates over time with clear auditability.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit trails?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records role-based access, decision records and change logs, maintaining a detailed audit trail that supports regulatory inspections and internal governance requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers, connecting data streams and workflows without replacing them, enabling a controlled, scalable compliance operating model.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT or other providers but organizes their outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and reports for easier operational use.
final_title: Review audit-ready evidence versioning with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports controlled evidence updates, version tracking, role-based access, and audit logs for institutional compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
